rationale: Address Greptile review (P1 + P2): direct CDN fetches now use an *http.Client honoring flags.timeout (was http.DefaultClient with no timeout). httpGetBody bounds the response body to 16 MiB via io.LimitReader to defend against misconfigured CDNs and HTML error pages.
evidence: PR #695 Greptile review (score 3/5): P1 download.go:268-276 binary downloads bypass --timeout; P2 nasa_shared.go:202 io.ReadAll lacks size guard.
